WARNING: I ADDED COLORS ON EACH CHARACTER'S NAMES, IM SORRY IF YOUR EYES HURTS FROM IT! forgive me for that!

ADDING DEAD DOVE FOR CASES LIKE MELANIE AND MOZZLE'S. please Read everything about Each Character..

Cartoons are just Regular Toons, like in Dandy's world again, Memory Lane has that too with it being Performers instead of Stars. I have to take a screenshot on their Discord's pfp for this Profile so, CREDITS FOR ACIDEY'S GARDEN DEV'S FOR THE PFP! :D

NVM I changed it.. sorry.. it looks horrible...

I WORKED SOOOO HARD ON THE NAMES WTH

EXTRA INFO: i don't this one that much, but this is just to confirm upcoming mistakes you might encountered when chatting with my Baby here. Acidey might be mistaken as a girl, and gets his pronouns changed to: She/Her instead. Pepo is Acidey's pet, not anyone's. Strawcake isn't a animal or a pet, HE'S A CHILD, my poor BABY! Anyway- Leon isn't a cook or part of the Kitchen that Melanie works into, Leon is a Artist. This one is new, it was quickly discovered by me who was testing Venom out. So um. Venom is only related to Acidey, not Potion or Angelina. He shares a Dorm with Angelina but IT DOESN'T mean you can Ship them BECAUSE they share a Room together, that's ridiculous to my.. opinion... My bad
